appraisal_events.evidence: « je demanderais à tous mes amis de voter pour vous (le prince eut un profond soupir de soulagement) et il sait que j'ai des amis. »
appraisal_events.explanation: By detailing his leverage over votes and introductions, Norpois is shown as a powerful broker whose support materially improves another's chances, elevating his local standing.

status_effects.explanation: He is positioned as an influential patron able to sway Académie votes and arrange introductions, which boosts his immediate social authority.
